Wreaken Construction

Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3307-08-26
Mining Campaign Success for Zemina Torval
Torval-Mastopolos Mining outperforms Wreaken Construction in the LTT 198 resource campaign, securing permanent corporate control and a new starport construction contract.
3307-08-19
LTT 198 Hosts Competing Mining Campaigns
Torval-Mastopolos Mining and Wreaken Construction request mined resource deliveries in LTT 198. The more successful corporation will establish a permanent starport.
3307-08-16
Rival Corporations Compete in LTT 198
Torval-Mastopolos Mining and Wreaken Construction both establish headquarters in the LTT 198 system, escalating their long-standing corporate rivalry.
3303-01-27
Galactic News Body Found at Wreaken Construction Site
An unidentified individual is found dead from radiation exposure at a Wreaken Construction site in the COL 70 sector. Pilots report heavy security and aggressive warnings at Wreaken facilities.
3302-11-18
Galactic News Construction Convoy Assembled
Wreaken Construction has assembled a large convoy of heavy construction ships and support vessels in the Zearla system. The purpose of the convoy is unknown, but the well-defended operation has sparked speculation linked to Admiral Denton Patreus's recent comments concerning the London Treaty.
